## Confidence Order

1. Storm over Raiders - strongest raw read at AAMI if Origin stars back up
2. Warriors over Cowboys - home and spine edge with Tom Dearden delayed
3. Panthers over Titans - class edge, Origin-rest caveat
4. Dolphins over Wests Tigers - form and injury edge
5. Bulldogs over Sea Eagles - rested Dogs, but Turbo return makes it live
6. Roosters over Sharks - home lean, Sharks pack danger
7. Knights over Dragons - home lean in the lowest-confidence game
